commit_subject: http_done: close Negotiate connections when done
base64: check for integer overflow on large input
krb5: avoid realloc(0)
parsedate: handle cut off numbers better
idn: switch to libidn2 use and IDNA2008 support
imap: if a FETCH response has no size, don't call write callback
tool_writeout: fixed a buffer read overrun on --write-out
TLS: Fix switching off SSL session id when client cert is used
smtp: use the upload buffer size for scratch buffer malloc
Curl_auth_create_plain_message: fix too-large-input-check
Curl_close: clear data->multi_easy on free to avoid use-after-free
ftp: CURLOPT_FTP_SKIP_PASV_IP by default
transfer: strip credentials from the auto-referer header field
metalink: remove
conncache: include the zone id in the "bundle" hashkey
http: avoid auth/cookie on redirects same host diff port
url: check SSH config match on connection reuse
vquic-tls: return appropirate errors on wolfSSL errors
x509asn1: remove superfluous free()
content_encoding: drop support for zlib before 1.2.0.4
openssl: toggling CURLSSLOPT_NO_PARTIALCHAIN makes a different CA cache
libssh2: fix sftp_statemachine busyloop when *block=true
[4.2.x] Refs CVE-2024-11168 -- Updated vendored _urlsplit() to properly validate IPv6 and IPvFuture addresses.
fast-import: disallow "feature export-marks" by default
path: safeguard `.git` against NTFS Alternate Streams Accesses
setup: tighten ownership checks post CVE-2022-24765
initgroups needs grp.h
upstream: Fix logic error in DisableForwarding option. This option
[crypto/ec] for ECC parameters with NULL or zero cofactor, compute it
Fix the RSA_SSLV23_PADDING padding type
Fix Null pointer deref in X509_issuer_and_serial_hash()
Fix infinite verification loops due to has_san_id
Fix possible infinite loop in BN_mod_sqrt()
Use safe pattern for buffer size determining in case of GOST key exchange
Fix usage of custom EVP_CIPHER objects
x509: fix double locking problem

When an error occurs while rewriting the parser tree for window functions in the sqlite3WindowRewrite() routine, make sure that pParse->nErr is set, and make sure that this shuts down any subsequent code generation that might depend on the transformations that were implemented.  This fixes a problem discovered by the Yongheng and Rui fuzzer.
fix: clean X-Forwarded-Prefix header for the dashboard.
Fix a bug when getting a gzip header extra field with inflate().
Neutralize zip file traversal attacks in miniunz.
